Biography
The Visitation of Worcestershire for Washburne in 1569, shown as Margarett, dau. and heire to John Power, ggg-grandson of Hughe Poerus

Wichenford

zh.Chancel Tomb, St. Lawrence Church, Wiche: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾維其福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margarett Poher於1378年出生在英國武斯特斯爾維其福德時，她的父親John le Poher11375歲，母親Eleanor34歲。她於1397年與John de Wassheburne在英國武斯特斯爾維其福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1427年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾斯坦福 奧 姆享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾維其福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margarett Poher于1378年出生在英国武斯特斯爾維其福德时，她的父亲John le Poher11375岁，母亲Eleanor34岁。她于1397年与John de Wassheburne在英国武斯特斯爾維其福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1427年在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾斯坦福 奧 姆享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾維其福德。

nameMeanings.name: Poher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a muddy pool (see   Pohl  ), or a habitational name for someone from any of several places called Pohl, Pohle, or Pohla.

variants.name: Pohl
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Otto, Wolfgang, Gerhard, Gunther, Hans, Horst, Manfred, Oskar, Claus, Dietrich.
German: topographic name from Middle Low German pōl ‘(muddy) pool, wetland’ (Low German Pohl), or a habitational name from any of several places called Pohl, Pohle, or Pohla.

variants.name: Poehler
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alfons, Dieter, Horst, Juergen, Otto.
topographic name for someone who lived by a muddy pool, from an agent noun derived from Middle Low German pōl ‘(muddy) pool’.

nameMeanings.name: Margarett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margrethe
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretha
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margarett Poher was born in 1378, in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, her father, John le Poher, was 11375 and her mother, Eleanor, was 34. She married John de Wassheburne in 1397, in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1427, in Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margarett Poher est née en 1378, à Wichenford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John le Poher, avait 11375 ans et sa mère, Eleanor, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé John de Wassheburne en 1397, à Wichenford, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1427, à Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Wichenford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margarett Poher 1378 in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John le Poher 11375 und ihre Mutter Eleanor 34. Sie hat 1397 in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England John de Wassheburne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1427 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Margarett Poherが1378年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウィチェンフォードで生まれた時，父John le Poherは11375歳，母Eleanorは34歳であった。1397年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウィチェンフォードでJohn de Wassheburneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1427年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスタンフォード オン テメで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウィチェンフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margarett Poher(이)가 1378년 영국 워스스터실르 위천퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John le Poher(은)는 11375세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1397년 영국 워스스터실르 위천퍼드에서 John de Wassheburne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 스탠퍼드  테에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 위천퍼드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John de Wassheburne em 1397, em Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Stanford, Worcestershire, England: станфорд он тем, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margarett Poher родилась в 1378 г. в местности вичэнфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John le Poher было 11375 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Wassheburne в 1397 г. в местности вичэнфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1427 г. в местности станфорд он тем, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности вичэнфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió en 1427, en Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
